'''UrrOr' Shurk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] who was active 
during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] for leading raids on her compound. If captured alive, he was to be fed to the Hutt's pet [[Krayt dragon/Legends|Krayt dragon]]. He was caught by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] in [[Tusken Canyon]]; although it was unspecified whether or not the bounty was for a live capture or a death, he was worth more dead (for a 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] payoff) then he was alive (for only 1,000 credits).

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
